label: Analyst Judgment
definition: Qualitative assessment based on analyst expertise and market observation

label: Web Research
definition: Outcome determined through post-hoc web research and secondary sources

label: Vendor Data
definition: Data sourced directly from vendor disclosures or press releases

label: Survey
definition: Data from structured survey of enterprises or users

label: Benchmark
definition: Performance data from standardized benchmark tests

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classifies a vendor or enterprise strategy or approach

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction about technology or vendor viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Documented actual result of a prior prediction or trend

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities or maturity

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance measurement from a formal benchmark

label: Framework Factor
definition: Component or factor in an analytical framework presented in the study

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative market size/share/trend data

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Named analyst or expert viewpoint without formal data backing
